description: Initial screen state: Dark background with white text instructions for screen sharing and a small video feed of the participant in the top right corner.
frame_description: A dark screen with the text: 'Great. To start, please click the "Share" button in the Meet call controls and choose to share this window.' A participant's video feed is in the top right.
